scripts.tauri:dev: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:debug: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && npx tauri icon ./desktop-icon.png && npx tauri build --debug
scripts.tauri:build: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && npx tauri icon ./desktop-icon.png && npx tauri build
scripts.android:init: tauri android init && npx tauri icon ./mobile-icon.png
scripts.android:dev: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && npx tauri android dev
scripts.android:debug: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && tauri android build --debug
scripts.android:release: rimraf src-tauri/target && astro build && tauri android build
